title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
